critical.mandate: Architecture must exist before creating epics
Every story must have depends_on and blocks declarations
Stories must be ordered by dependency topology + business priority

step.title: Define Epics
step.action: Group related features into logical epics
Each epic: name, description, goal, success criteria

step.title: Break Into Stories
step.action: For each epic, create user stories
Each story needs: title, description, acceptance criteria, size estimate (S/M/L/XL)
Use format: "As a [user], I want to [action] so that [benefit]"

step.title: Declare Dependencies
step.action: For each story, declare depends_on: [story-ids] and blocks: [story-ids]

step.title: Priority Ordering
step.action: Sort stories by: dependency topology first, then business priority

step.title: Generate Output
